primary_signals.summary: SPP transport misrepresentation — Melissa claims 'per court order' Eli must bring Olivia home, misrepresenting SPP which assigns transport obligation to Melissa. First documented SPP violation in dataset.
Transport offloading — Melissa imposes unilateral transport obligation on Eli, shifting her SPP-required duty without consent. Arc promotes CANDIDATE to WATCHING at this signal.

Dance enrollment schedule conflict — Melissa's unilateral enrollment in Thursday dance class creates standing scheduling conflict with Eli's parenting time. RF-03+RF-06 compound (enrollment conflict + compelled payment attempt).
Transport offloading cluster — multiple instances of Melissa shifting SPP transport obligations to Eli without consent. Part of sustained Phase C transport weaponization pattern.
Transport offloading cluster — continuation of Phase C transport weaponization. ARC-RF03-001 promotes WATCHING to ACTIVE at this signal (5th confirmed instance of SPP transport manipulation).
Transport offloading — final dataset instance. Pattern unresolved at dataset close (April 12, 2026).

peripheral_signals.summary: Cat allergy scheme — RF-15 Category B + RF-02 primary; RF-03 peripheral (environmental logistics condition imposed as visitation prerequisite — cat removal demand).
Vaping/asthma scheme — RF-15+RF-02 primary; RF-03 peripheral (manufactured environmental health condition as visitation constraint mechanism).
Vaping/asthma scheme continuation — same mechanism as P-002; RF-03 peripheral compound.

ARC-RF03-001.name: Weaponized Scheduling
ARC-RF03-001.note: Transport offloading is the dominant mechanism — 5 of 6 signals are SPP obligation shifts (ADD-004). One signal is schedule conflict via unilateral enrollment (ADD-006). Father's Day location redirect (ADD-003) confirmed by Eli in CP2 but not discretely located in message record; event may predate dataset window or use different keyword. Urgent care prerequisite (ADD-005) also CP2-confirmed but specific event not keyword-identified in messages — likely in B-007/B-008 area.

ARC-RF03-002.name: Activity Enrollment Obstruction
ARC-RF03-002.note: No clear activity enrollment creating a standing visitation-time conflict was discretely documented beyond S-003 (dance — classified under ARC-RF03-001 as transport compound). Dance enrollment is RF-06 primary; scheduling conflict dimension is RF-03 compound. Arc closes at CANDIDATE — weak CP2 confirmation did not produce independent signals.

methodology_notes: ADD-004 (transport offloading / SPP obligation shift) is the primary signal type — 5 of 6 primary signals. Eli confirmed Melissa 'still tries it from time to time' at CP2 date, consistent with sustained Phase C signal production.

ADD-003 (Father's Day location redirect) confirmed by Eli at CP2 but not located with 'Father's Day' keyword in B-006/B-007/B-008 area — messages in that range show blame-shifting framing, not logistics redirect language. May require timestamp-sequence analysis rather than keyword search.

ADD-005 (urgent care prerequisite for family visit) confirmed at CP2 but not keyword-located; Jan 2024 urgent care context (ROW-4427-4428) reflected a genuine medical situation, not a conditional blockade.
Peripheral compound rule applied consistently: cat allergy and vaping/asthma schemes are RF-15+RF-02 primary; RF-03 flagged as peripheral only per ADD-001.

No Sev-2 or Sev-3 signals in this pass — all documented instances are Sev-1 (logistics manipulation without complete access denial). RF-03 is consistently compound with RF-02 in more severe instances.

cross_pass_compounds.mechanism: Dance enrollment — RF-06 primary (compelled payment ADD-007); RF-03 secondary (scheduling conflict ADD-006)
Cat allergy and vaping/asthma schemes — conditional logistics imposed via manufactured medical pretext

key_calibrations: Transport offloading confirmed recurring at CP2 date — still occurring
Father's Day redirect example named by Eli — may predate dataset or use different language
Urgent care prerequisite confirmed — specific event not identified in messages
SPP citation required by Eli to enforce Melissa's transport obligation — confirms pattern
